tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated potassium (5.2 mmol/L). Renal function, glucose, and HbA1c are normal. The isolated mild hyperkalemia may be transient or related to sample handling; consider repeat testing and clinical correlation. No evidence of renal or metabolic dysfunction at this time.

text.div: Provider Organization: Punkt Lekarski w Cieksynie
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
